channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gas prices won't return to pre-war levels any time soon
item.description: If a U.S.-Iran peace deal actually happens this time — and that's still a big if— consumers have a long road ahead before filling up returns all the w...

item.title: How Elon grew to love Anthropic
item.description: Elon Musk's surprise Anthropic deal allows him to accomplish two things at once: turn unused compute into revenue before an expected SpaceX IPO next m...

item.title: Behind the Curtain: Intelligence explosion
item.description: Anthropic , the AI lab whose identity is wrapped around warning the world about AI risk, is claiming "early signs" of AI not just coding its own produ...

item.title: Trump's redistricting revenge tour heads down South
item.description: President Trump's revenge tour didn't just draw blood in Indiana. It put Republican holdouts across the South on notice. Why it matters: Republicans a...
